message:
test(core): add property-based tests for three-lane scheduler (ft-2p9cb.2.1.3)

10 new proptests for B1 scheduler invariants:
- Lane ordering matches priority
- stage_to_lane covers all pipeline stages
- Depth monotonic: admit increases, complete decreases
- Input items never shed (only deferred)
- Bulk items shed under input pressure
- CPU shares sum to 1.0
- Serde roundtrips for snapshot and degradation
- next_lane respects strict priority ordering

215 unit + 91 property = 306 total tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
